        },
        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/11944",
          "id": "11944",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "accountId": "712020:5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Kim Heinz",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Testing on Test"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cID\u201d filter works in Purchasing Tracker."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cID\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cRequest Date\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cRequest By Date\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cRequest By Date\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cWO#\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cWO\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cRequested Total\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cDivision\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cDivision\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cType\u201d Filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cType\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },

                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "The \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter in Purchasing Tracker, the filter does not have time on it, but the request dates int the columns do, so when I put in a date, it defaults to 00:00:00 and does not pull up the ones with the actual date. Created Ticket ",

                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "\u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is not working. When I choose yes or blank, the screen goes to this and it never stops searching. There were not any yes or blanks, but it should pop up with 0 found at the bottom and stop searching eventually."
                          }

          "updateAuthor": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "accountId": "712020:5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Kim Heinz",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "created": "2025-03-04T18:05:43.639-0500",
          "updated": "2025-03-10T16:08:45.385-0400",
          "jsdPublic": true
        },
        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/11971",
          "id": "11971",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3A9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",
            "accountId": "557058:9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Viktor Belashov",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Resolved"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "\u201cWO#\u201d filter is not working. WO does not show up on the export at all. Created ticket \u2192 FIXED"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "There is not a filter for \u201cRequested Total\u201d. Created Ticket \u2192 FIXED"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Approvers Filter is not working. \u2192 FIXED"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "\u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is not working. \u2192 FIXED"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "hardBreak"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "hardBreak"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "\u201cDivision Filter\u201d does not work. \u2192 NOT FIXED. "
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "hardBreak"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "This issue stems from a database relationship problem:"
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "bulletList",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "paragraph",
                                "content": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "text",
                                    "text": "PO (Purchase Order) items have one-to-many relations with PO Request items"
                                  }
                                ]
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "paragraph",
                                "content": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "text",
                                    "text": "Multiple PO Request items can be associated with a single PO item"
                                  }
                                ]
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "paragraph",
                                "content": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "text",
                                    "text": "These PO Request items have different request_id values"
                                  }
                                ]
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "This relational structure is causing the Division Filter feature to malfunction, as it cannot properly handle the one-to-many relationship between PO items and their associated request items."
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "hardBreak"
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          "updateAuthor": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3A9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",
            "accountId": "557058:9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",

              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Viktor Belashov",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "created": "2025-03-10T20:11:27.106-0400",
          "updated": "2025-03-10T20:11:27.106-0400",
          "jsdPublic": true
        },
        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/11975",
          "id": "11975",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "accountId": "712020:5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "avatarUrls": {

              {

                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified \u201cID\u201d filter work in Purchasing Tracker."
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "bulletList",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "mediaSingle",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "width": 50,
                                  "layout": "align-start"
                                },
                                "content": [
                                  {
                                    "type": "media",
                                    "attrs": {

                                      "id": "2a0e3037-35d0-47f3-a077-1b914c03c752",

                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified when you have a filter set for \u201cID\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "bulletList",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "mediaSingle",
                                "attrs": {

                                  "layout": "align-start"
                                },
                                "content": [

                                    "type": "media",
                                    "attrs": {

                                      "id": "7ce3220d-981e-439e-a771-2c3d350d100a",
                                      "alt": "Screen Shot 2025-03-04 at 5.23.15 PM.png",
                                      "collection": "",
                                      "height": 668,
                                      "width": 952
                                    }
                                  }
                                ]

                        ]

                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "The \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter in Purchasing Tracker, the filter does not have time on it, but the request dates int the columns do, so when I put in a date, it defaults to 00:00:00 and does not pull up the ones with the actual date. Created Ticket ",
                            "marks": [
                              {
                                "type": "textColor",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "color": "#ff5630"
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "inlineCard",
                            "attrs": {
                              "url": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/browse/SM-763"
                            }
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": " for this issue.",
                            "marks": [
                              {
                                "type": "textColor",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "color": "#ff5630"
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "bulletList",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "listItem",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "mediaSingle",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "width": 50,
                                  "layout": "align-start"
                                },
                                "content": [
                                  {

                                    "attrs": {

                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Update 3/13/24 Verified \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is working correctly."
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": " \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter for blank is not working. When I choose yes, it does show up 0. Blanks is showing all the nos. It is not showing 0, which is what it should be doing.",

          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Testing on Stage"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify filter for \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d works. Blank and yes filters were not working."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cID\u201d filter works in Purchasing Tracker."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cID\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cRequest Date\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cRequest By Date\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cRequest By Date\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify \u201cWO#\u201d filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",

                            "text": "Verified \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d Filter works."
                          }

                      },

                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "When you have a filter set for \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data did not export. Kept loading screen for a while."

                    "text": "*Notes: I retested all of these issues in Test and Stage. They are only an issue in Stage. Messaged Jason in Discord. Updated the Issue notes."

        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12426",
          "id": "12426",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/48",
              "24x24": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/24",
              "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",
              "32x32": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/32"
            },
            "displayName": "Jason Hawsey",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Viktor, I did make a change to fix a specific issue with the display and filtering of the Approval column but there is something wrong in the SPA side of the purchasing tracker.  "
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "hardBreak"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Everything works great on test but on stage it is not working right.  See my video.  This is not just related to the approval column but on a lot of columns.  It appears there is some spa code missing on stage that is on test."
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "mediaSingle",
                "attrs": {
                  "layout": "align-start"
                },
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "media",
                    "attrs": {
                      "type": "file",
                      "id": "fa16b33d-f279-4992-bbff-73b6c06e6461",
                      "alt": "CleanShot 2025-05-13 at 11.01.29.mp4",
                      "collection": "",
                      "height": 1156,
                      "width": 2162
                    }
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          "updateAuthor": {

        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12611",
          "id": "12611",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/48",
              "24x24": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/24",
              "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",
              "32x32": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/32"
            },
            "displayName": "Jason Hawsey",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Added back the dropdown for Approval on both test and stage."
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Everything else worked for me on both test and live except for these:"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Blank filter did not work."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "When you \u201cx\u201d out of Dept filter, it is populating all depts in filter."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Try them again.  I only tested the red items in your results.  These 2 issues need to go to Viktor to fix if you dont find others."
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph"
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "For the Needs My Approval column if you filter by \u201cNo\u201d it wont finish just because there are 23,000 records adn the server is weak.  but do by \u201cYes\u201d and it works."
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          "updateAuthor": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/48",
              "24x24": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/24",
              "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",
              "32x32": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/32"
            },
            "displayName": "Jason Hawsey",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "created": "2025-06-30T11:42:30.898-0400",
          "updated": "2025-06-30T12:11:11.939-0400",
          "jsdPublic": true
        },
        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12624",
          "id": "12624",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "accountId": "712020:5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Kim Heinz",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Retesting Issues on Stage"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify drop down was added back to Approver on Test."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify drop down was added back to Approver on Stage."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify"
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": " ",
                            "marks": [
                              {
                                "type": "textColor",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "color": "#ff5630"
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "when you have a filter set to \u201cRequested Total\u201d that when you export it, the filter data is exporting."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cType\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {

                            "text": "When you have a filter set for \u201cType\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data is not exporting. It is still freezing. I ran most of them.                             "text": "The multi-value filter now works correctly and will return records for all selected values!",

          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Testing on Test"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you choose \u201cblank\u201d within the filter drop down option, that it pulls all rows that are blank."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Results on Test"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified when you choose \u201cblank\u201d within the filter drop down option, that it pulls all rows that are blank."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "**This issue was only fixed on Test so far. Needs to be fixed on Stage."
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]

                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Issue: ",
                            "marks": [
                              {
                                "type": "textColor",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "color": "#ff5630"
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Jason made this a drop down, but it not a drop down in stage. Actually, it is not set up correctly in Test either anymore. It needs to be fixed in both places. This has happened before, Jason sets it up to be a drop down and then it goes back to a search field. Needs to be a drop down with the options. Did not Verify \u201cApproval\u201d Filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cApproval\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified \u201cApprovers\u201d Filter works."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Issue: ",
                            "marks": [
                              {
                                "type": "textColor",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "color": "#ff5630"
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "The export is not pulling the filtered name. This is not working in Test or Stage. Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cApprovers\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",

                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified when you have a filter set for \u201cAssigned To\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                          }
                        ]

                  {
                    "type": "listItem",

                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": " If you \u201cx\u201d out your department filters it is leaving the filter symbol in the column header even though you don\u2019t have anything set to filter. All other columns refresh and the filter symbol is removed.  Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cDept\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly. This works correctly in Test."
                          }

                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "I fixed these:"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {

                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Approval column not a dropdown"

                      {

                ]

          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Testing Issues on Test"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify the filter for the Approval Column gives the user options to check from instead of a search field."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify the Approvers show up in the Export."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verify when you \u201cx\u201d  the used filters that it removes the filter symbol from the header in the Dept Column."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Results on Test"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "bulletList",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified the filter for the Approval Column gives the user options to check from instead of a search field."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified the Approvers show up in the Export."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "listItem",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "text",
                            "text": "Verified when you \u201cx\u201d  the used filters that it removes the filter symbol from the header in the Dept Column."
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },

                    "text": "Found these issues while testing on test. "

        {
          "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/22547",
          "id": "22547",
          "author": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3Abdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
            "accountId": "557058:bdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
            "avatarUrls": {
              "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
              "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
              "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
              "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png"
            },
            "displayName": "Darl Anthony Pepito",
            "active": true,
            "timeZone": "America/New_York",
            "accountType": "atlassian"
          },
          "body": {
            "type": "doc",
            "version": 1,
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "paragraph",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "text",
                    "text": "Resolution (SVN backend r16662):\n\nFixed the Purchasing Tracker filters for the Approval and Approver(s) columns:\n\n**Approval Column:**\n- Blank filter now correctly returns records with NULL, empty, or 'Approval Not Needed' values\n- Override filter now properly matches 'Override Provided by...' values using partial matching\n- Display values are normalized to match the filter options (Approved, Pending Approval, Override, Rejected)\n\n**Approver(s) Column:**\n- Blank filter now correctly returns only POs with no approvers by checking both the designated approvers table and approval history\n- Specific approver filter now includes results from both designated approvers and approval action history\n\nReady for QA testing."
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          "updateAuthor": {
            "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3Abdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
            "accountId": "557058:bdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
            "avatarUrls": {

            },
            "displayName": "Darl Anthony Pepito",
            "active": true,

        }

                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified \u201cID\u201d filter work in Purchasing Tracker."

                    "content": [

                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified when you have a filter set for \u201cID\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."

              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "The \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter in Purchasing Tracker, the filter does not have time on it, but the request dates int the columns do, so when I put in a date, it defaults to 00:00:00 and does not pull up the ones with the actual date. Created Ticket ",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "inlineCard",
                        "attrs": {
                          "url": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/browse/SM-763"
                        }
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": " for this issue.",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },

                            },

                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "\u201cWO#\u201d filter is not working. WO does not show up on the export at all. Created ticket ",

                    "content": [
                      {

                        "text": "There is not a filter for \u201cRequested Total\u201d. Created Ticket ",

                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "\u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is not working. When I choose yes or blank, the screen goes to this and it never stops searching. There were not any yes or blanks, but it should pop up with 0 found at the bottom and stop searching eventually."

    {
      "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/11971",
      "id": "11971",
      "author": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3A9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",
        "accountId": "557058:9eb0e162-549c-4061-98e4-c5bff1783a15",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
          "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
          "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png",
          "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/1790d48e4404aec1861d5692dff79fc9?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FVB-3.png"
        },
        "displayName": "Viktor Belashov",
        "active": true,
        "timeZone": "America/New_York",
        "accountType": "atlassian"
      },
      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Resolved"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "\u201cWO#\u201d filter is not working. WO does not show up on the export at all. Created ticket \u2192 FIXED"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "There is not a filter for \u201cRequested Total\u201d. Created Ticket \u2192 FIXED"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Approvers Filter is not working. \u2192 FIXED"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "\u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is not working. \u2192 FIXED"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "hardBreak"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "hardBreak"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "\u201cDivision Filter\u201d does not work. \u2192 NOT FIXED. "
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "hardBreak"
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "This issue stems from a database relationship problem:"
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "paragraph",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "text",
                                "text": "PO (Purchase Order) items have one-to-many relations with PO Request items"
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "paragraph",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "text",
                                "text": "Multiple PO Request items can be associated with a single PO item"
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "paragraph",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "text",
                                "text": "These PO Request items have different request_id values"
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "This relational structure is causing the Division Filter feature to malfunction, as it cannot properly handle the one-to-many relationship between PO items and their associated request items."
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "hardBreak"
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },

      "body": {

        "content": [

          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Results on Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified \u201cID\u201d filter work in Purchasing Tracker."
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "mediaSingle",
                            "attrs": {
                              "width": 50,
                              "layout": "align-start"
                            },
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "media",

                                  "collection": "",
                                  "height": 674,
                                  "width": 1401
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          }

                      }

                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified when you have a filter set for \u201cID\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "mediaSingle",
                            "attrs": {
                              "width": 50,
                              "layout": "align-start"
                            },
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "media",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "type": "file",
                                  "id": "7ce3220d-981e-439e-a771-2c3d350d100a",
                                  "alt": "Screen Shot 2025-03-04 at 5.23.15 PM.png",
                                  "collection": "",
                                  "height": 668,
                                  "width": 952
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "paragraph",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "text",
                                "text": "\u00a0"
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "The \u201cRequest Date\u201d filter in Purchasing Tracker, the filter does not have time on it, but the request dates int the columns do, so when I put in a date, it defaults to 00:00:00 and does not pull up the ones with the actual date. Created Ticket ",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "inlineCard",
                        "attrs": {
                          "url": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/browse/SM-763"
                        }
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": " for this issue.",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "listItem",
                        "content": [
                          {
                            "type": "mediaSingle",
                            "attrs": {
                              "width": 50,
                              "layout": "align-start"
                            },
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "media",
                                "attrs": {
                                  "type": "file",
                                  "id": "75fe95c1-56a8-4b01-9f8c-feba93e557f8",
                                  "alt": "Screen Shot 2025-03-04 at 5.29.24 PM.png",
                                  "collection": "",

                                  "width": 1389
                                }
                              }
                            ]

                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [

                        "text": "Verified \u201cWO#\u201d filter is working. "
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "WO does not show up on the export at all. Created ticket ",

                        "content": [

                                  "alt": "Screen Shot 2025-03-11 at 12.24.53 PM.png",
                                  "collection": "",
                                  "height": 674,
                                  "width": 1386
                                }
                              }
                            ]
                          },
                          {
                            "type": "paragraph"
                          }

                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified the filter for \u201cRequested Total\u201d works."
                      },

                          {
                            "type": "paragraph",
                            "content": [
                              {
                                "type": "text",
                                "text": "\u00a0"
                              }
                            ]
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Update 3/13/24 Verified \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter is working correctly."
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": " \u201cNeeds My Approval\u201d filter for blank is not working. When I choose yes, it does show up 0. Blanks is showing all the nos. It is not showing 0, which is what it should be doing.",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },

    {
      "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12426",
      "id": "12426",
      "author": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/48",
          "24x24": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/24",
          "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",
          "32x32": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/32"
        },
        "displayName": "Jason Hawsey",
        "active": true,
        "timeZone": "America/New_York",
        "accountType": "atlassian"
      },
      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Viktor, I did make a change to fix a specific issue with the display and filtering of the Approval column but there is something wrong in the SPA side of the purchasing tracker.  "
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "hardBreak"
              },
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Everything works great on test but on stage it is not working right.  See my video.  This is not just related to the approval column but on a lot of columns.  It appears there is some spa code missing on stage that is on test."
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "mediaSingle",
            "attrs": {
              "layout": "align-start"
            },
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "media",
                "attrs": {
                  "type": "file",
                  "id": "fa16b33d-f279-4992-bbff-73b6c06e6461",
                  "alt": "CleanShot 2025-05-13 at 11.01.29.mp4",
                  "collection": "",
                  "height": 1156,
                  "width": 2162
                }
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
