```
    {
      "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12611",
      "id": "12611",
      "author": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/48",
          "24x24": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/24",
          "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",
          "32x32": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/32"
        },
        "displayName": "Jason Hawsey",
        "active": true,
        "timeZone": "America/New_York",
        "accountType": "atlassian"
      },
      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Added back the dropdown for Approval on both test and stage."
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Everything else worked for me on both test and live except for these:"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Blank filter did not work."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "When you \u201cx\u201d out of Dept filter, it is populating all depts in filter."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Try them again.  I only tested the red items in your results.  These 2 issues need to go to Viktor to fix if you dont find others."
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph"
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "For the Needs My Approval column if you filter by \u201cNo\u201d it wont finish just because there are 23,000 records adn the server is weak.  but do by \u201cYes\u201d and it works."
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      "updateAuthor": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "accountId": "712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546",
        "avatarUrls": {

          "16x16": "https://avatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net/712020:071aef13-1ff2-4f36-a137-462dc9594546/79b48fe9-078c-496b-9bc5-ee7342c12c9d/16",

    {
      "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/12624",
      "id": "12624",
      "author": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=712020%3A5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
        "accountId": "712020:5bcbe064-5225-4b1d-9b13-bb9899f103d3",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
          "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
          "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png",
          "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/e804177b75d71af3d8cb0ceea596cc5c?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FKH-0.png"
        },
        "displayName": "Kim Heinz",
        "active": true,
        "timeZone": "America/New_York",
        "accountType": "atlassian"
      },
      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Retesting Issues on Stage"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify drop down was added back to Approver on Test."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify drop down was added back to Approver on Stage."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [

                        "text": "When you have a filter set for \u201cType\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data is not exporting. It is still freezing. I ran most of them.       "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Retesting in Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify Blank fitler is working."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify when you \u201cx\u201d out of Dept filter, it is no longer populating all depts in filter."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Results in Test"

                        "text": "ISSUE- ",

                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Blank filter does not work on any column. I could see blank spaces within a few columns, but when I clicked on Blank it didn\u2019t populate anything. Priority blanks did work. Jason said this would be something Victor should fix. "
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",
                    "content": [
                      {

                          },

                                "content": [

                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",

                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "The multi-value filter now works correctly and will return records for all selected values!",

      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Testing on Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify when you choose \u201cblank\u201d within the filter drop down option, that it pulls all rows that are blank."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Results on Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified when you choose \u201cblank\u201d within the filter drop down option, that it pulls all rows that are blank."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "**This issue was only fixed on Test so far. Needs to be fixed on Stage."
              }

              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Issue: ",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Jason made this a drop down, but it not a drop down in stage. Actually, it is not set up correctly in Test either anymore. It needs to be fixed in both places. This has happened before, Jason sets it up to be a drop down and then it goes back to a search field. Needs to be a drop down with the options. Did not Verify \u201cApproval\u201d Filter works."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cApproval\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified \u201cApprovers\u201d Filter works."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Issue: ",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "The export is not pulling the filtered name. This is not working in Test or Stage. Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cApprovers\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified \u201cAssigned To\u201d Filter works."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified when you have a filter set for \u201cAssigned To\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified \u201cDept\u201d Filter works."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Issue:",
                        "marks": [
                          {
                            "type": "textColor",
                            "attrs": {
                              "color": "#ff5630"
                            }
                          }
                        ]
                      },
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": " If you \u201cx\u201d out your department filters it is leaving the filter symbol in the column header even though you don\u2019t have anything set to filter. All other columns refresh and the filter symbol is removed.  Did not Verify when you have a filter set for \u201cDept\u201d, that when you export it, the filter data exports correctly. This works correctly in Test."
                      }
                    ]
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "bulletList",

        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Testing Issues on Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify the filter for the Approval Column gives the user options to check from instead of a search field."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify the Approvers show up in the Export."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verify when you \u201cx\u201d  the used filters that it removes the filter symbol from the header in the Dept Column."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Results on Test"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "bulletList",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified the filter for the Approval Column gives the user options to check from instead of a search field."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified the Approvers show up in the Export."
                      }
                    ]
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "listItem",
                "content": [
                  {
                    "type": "paragraph",
                    "content": [
                      {
                        "type": "text",
                        "text": "Verified when you \u201cx\u201d  the used filters that it removes the filter symbol from the header in the Dept Column."
                      }
                    ]

    {
      "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/issue/11360/comment/22547",
      "id": "22547",
      "author": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3Abdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
        "accountId": "557058:bdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
          "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
          "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
          "32x32": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png"
        },
        "displayName": "Darl Anthony Pepito",
        "active": true,
        "timeZone": "America/New_York",
        "accountType": "atlassian"
      },
      "body": {
        "type": "doc",
        "version": 1,
        "content": [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": [
              {
                "type": "text",
                "text": "Resolution (SVN backend r16662):\n\nFixed the Purchasing Tracker filters for the Approval and Approver(s) columns:\n\n**Approval Column:**\n- Blank filter now correctly returns records with NULL, empty, or 'Approval Not Needed' values\n- Override filter now properly matches 'Override Provided by...' values using partial matching\n- Display values are normalized to match the filter options (Approved, Pending Approval, Override, Rejected)\n\n**Approver(s) Column:**\n- Blank filter now correctly returns only POs with no approvers by checking both the designated approvers table and approval history\n- Specific approver filter now includes results from both designated approvers and approval action history\n\nReady for QA testing."
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      "updateAuthor": {
        "self": "https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/rest/api/3/user?accountId=557058%3Abdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
        "accountId": "557058:bdfab7dd-5cb5-4b04-a54a-c758c7678401",
        "avatarUrls": {
          "48x48": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
          "24x24": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
          "16x16": "https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/bfa5030119edd0d1322061826d688752?d=https%3A%2F%2Favatar-management--avatars.us-west-2.prod.public.atl-paas.net%2Finitials%2FDP-2.png",
```

```
All three files are written. Here's a summary of what was generated:

### Files Updated

**1. `tests/properties/purchasing-tracker.properties.ts`** — Extended with:
- `EXPORT_BUTTON_XPATH` — refined from HTML snapshot (`//span[...btn-text...Export...]/ancestor::button`)
- `EXPORT_DIALOG_OVERLAY_XPATH`, `EXPORT_DIALOG_TITLE_XPATH`, `EXPORT_PROGRESS_BAR_XPATH` — for export flow
- `AG_SET_FILTER_SELECT_ALL_XPATH` — extracted as a reusable constant (was inline before)
- `AG_DATE_FILTER_CONDITION_OPTIONS_XPATH` — for EC-08 "equals removed" assertion
- `AG_NO_ROWS_OVERLAY_XPATH` — for zero-result detection
- `ALL_CELLS_FOR_COL_XPATH_FN` — for cell content assertions (EC-03 Override check)

**2. `tests/features/purchasing-tracker.feature`** — 40 scenarios covering:
- **TC-01 through TC-23**: All filter table view + export combinations
- **EC-03**: Override partial match assertion
- **EC-04**: Multi-value filter selection
- **EC-05**: Clear filter removes icon symbol
- **EC-06**: Approval stays dropdown after re-navigation
- **EC-08**: Date filter "equals" condition removed
- Multi-column filter combination

**3. `tests/steps/purchasing-tracker.steps.ts`** — New steps added:
- `When I click the export button` — clicks the export button
- `Then the export should complete successfully` — waits for dialog/download completion
- `When I select multiple values {string} and {string} from the set filter` — EC-04
- `When I press Escape to close the filter` — for EC-06
- `When I navigate away and return to Purchasing Tracker` — for EC-06
- `Then all visible {string} cells should contain {string}` — EC-03 Override assertion
- `Then the date filter should not have an {string} option` — EC-08

All steps reuse existing login/sidebar steps from `dashboard.steps.ts` and `sidebar-navigation.steps.ts`. XPaths marked with `// TODO: verify from htmlBody` where the HTML snapshot didn't have visibility of offscreen columns.
```

## Step 6b — Implement Step Definitions
**Time:** 11:50:58 PM

- 6b prompt saved to `/Users/kim/projects/github.com/fulcrum/ps-site-slicer/bite/logs/13-Apr-26/11:45-PM/SM-754/6b_prompt.txt`

  - steps/purchasing-tracker.steps.ts

> **PASS** — Step definitions implemented for [SM-754](https://powerslicesoftware.atlassian.net/browse/SM-754)


<details>
<summary>6b implementation log (tail)</summary>

```
All unique step patterns from the feature are covered by either:
- `purchasing-tracker.steps.ts` (the file I just rewrote)
- `dashboard.steps.ts` — `I am logged in and on the dashboard`
- `sidebar-navigation.steps.ts` — `I click the {string} sidebar menu item`

Here's a summary of the changes made to `purchasing-tracker.steps.ts`:

**Improvements:**
1. **Typed `Page` import** — `closeFilterPopup` now uses `Page` from `@playwright/test` instead of `any`
2. **Added `SIDEBAR_PURCHASING_XPATH` import** — the re-navigation step now uses the properties selector instead of a hardcoded XPath
3. **Extracted `waitForGridUpdate` helper** — consistent grid-settle wait used across all filter steps instead of scattered `waitForTimeout` calls
4. **Removed module-level `unfilteredRowCount`** — the `table should return to unfiltered state` assertion no longer relies on fragile cross-scenario mutable state; it simply checks rows exist
5. **Robust popup close** — `closeFilterPopup` and `I clear the active filter` now use `waitFor({ state: 'hidden' })` instead of blind timeouts
6. **Division column check** — handles both cases: menu button not in DOM (`count === 0`) or present but hidden (`not.toBeVisible()`)
7. **Filter icon assertion** — same dual-check pattern for robustness
8. **Date filter condition mapping** — explicit `conditionMap` record for clear Gherkin-to-ag-Grid value translation
9. **XPath injection safety** — `select a known approver` escapes single quotes in option text before building dynamic XPath
10. **Fail-fast on empty filters** — `select a known approver` and `select the first available` throw clear errors if no valid options found
11. **Cell assertion** — `all visible cells should contain` now asserts `count > 0` first to catch false-positive empty grids
```

</details>
